bridge.description: Name of bridge or fake bridge to manage

parent.description: Bridge parent of the fake bridge to manage

vlan.description: The VLAN id of the fake bridge to manage (must be between 0 and 4095). This parameter is required if I(parent) parameter is set.

timeout.description: How long to wait for ovs-vswitchd to respond

external_ids.description: A dictionary of external-ids. Omitting this parameter is a No-op. To  clear all external-ids pass an empty value.

fail_mode.description: Set bridge fail-mode. The default value (None) is a No-op.

set.description: Run set command after bridge configuration. This parameter is non-idempotent, play will always return I(changed) state if present

database_socket.description: Path/ip to datbase socket to use Default path is used if not specified Path should start with

openvswitch.openvswitch.openvswitch_db.description: Set column values in record in database table.

state.description: Configures the state of the key. When set to I(present), the I(key) and I(value) pair will be set on the I(record) and when set to I(absent) the I(key) will not be set.

table.description: Identifies the table in the database.

record.description: Identifies the record in the table.

col.description: Identifies the column in the record.

key.description: Identifies the key in the record column, when the column is a map type.

value.description: Expected value for the table, record, column and key.

timeout.description: How long to wait for ovs-vswitchd to respond

database_socket.description: Path/ip to datbase socket to use Default path is used if not specified Path should start with

port.description: Name of port to manage on the bridge

tag.description: VLAN tag for this port. Must be a value between 0 and 4095.

timeout.description: How long to wait for ovs-vswitchd to respond

external_ids.description: Dictionary of external_ids applied to a port.

set.description: Set multiple properties on a port.

database_socket.description: Path/ip to datbase socket to use Default path is used if not specified Path should start with
